title: Resource Graphs, Cache Evidence, Budgets, and Performance Non-Claims · Language Lens: Cache Validator Evidence
summary: The tool reports document bytes as total page weight, ignores encoded versus decoded sizes and browser discovery, and turns one server timing into user performance. Predict owner authority, URL and HTTP state, Go ownership, bounded work, accessibility impact, failure, cleanup, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler go cache validator evidence increment in static resource and delivery evidence dossier. Learners progress through prediction,…

For Authorized site auditing and Go Defend the Cache Validator Evidence model · Theory Cache Validator…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Long max-age alone proves efficient delivery.
